problem: What is the sum of the digits of the base-2 expression for $222_{10}$?

classified_questions.question: How can we express the decimal number 222 in base-2 (binary) form?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the largest power of 2 that is less than 222? What is the corresponding binary digit for this power of 2?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: What is the remainder when we subtract the largest power of 2 from 222?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Is the next largest power of 2 less than the remainder we obtained in the previous step? If not, what is the new remainder after subtracting the next largest power of 2?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can we express the decimal number 222 in terms of the binary digits obtained so far?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can we continue this process of finding the binary digits for the remaining powers of 2 until we reach the smallest power of 2?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the binary expression for $222_{10}$ when we have obtained all the binary digits?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the sum of the digits in the base-2 expression for 222?
classified_questions.label: b
